summary: Completed the BLOCKING R3-005 per-split polling fan-out and the NON_BLOCKING R3-006 attach detection in a single refactor pass. Each PC `TerminalSplitPaneContent` now owns its own `useTerminalPanePolling({ worktreeId, cliToolId })` instance, so splitIndex=0 (e.g. Claude) and splitIndex>=1 (e.g. Codex) fetch `/current-output` independently. `NavigationButtons`, `PromptPanel`, and `MessageInput` are now rendered for every split (no longer gated on `splitIndex===0`). `attaching` initializes to true and flips to false on the first successful fetch, wiring the attach skeleton to real data. `WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx` PC branch was simplified: `renderSplitPane` no longer reads `state.terminal.*` (the slice survives only for mobile). Mobile path was left literally unchanged, and `useWorktreeUIState` reducer was not touched (S3-006 boundary respected). Added 12 new unit tests (6 for `useTerminalPanePolling`, 6 for `TerminalSplitPaneContent`). Updated cli-tab-switching test to clear localStorage between cases (was leaking split-CLI selection) and the visibilitychange throttle test to exclude per-pane `/current-output` calls. Also updated `CLAUDE.md` (4 new module rows + WorktreeDetailRefactored/MessageInput/FilePanelSplit notes for #728) and `CHANGELOG.md` [Unreleased] (1 line). All quality gates green: lint 0, tsc 0, 6699/6706 tests pass (+12 vs baseline 6687), build success.

refactor_results.notes: Approach B (work-plan recommended) implemented as a smart wrapper `TerminalSplitPaneContent` that owns its own `useTerminalPanePolling` instance. The compat shim that read `state.terminal.*` for splitIndex=0 was removed from the PC `renderSplitPane`. Mobile continues to read `state.terminal.*`; the parent's polling loop and reducer slice are preserved unchanged. cli-tab-switching tests redesigned: needed localStorage.clear() in beforeEach because terminal-splits state was leaking between cases; the existing 'stale fetch' invariant now flows through the per-pane requestId guard inside the hook. The visibilitychange throttle test was extended to also exclude `/current-output` calls (per-pane polling fires on visibility=visible, independent of the parent's throttle this test targets).

`attaching` initializes to true in `useTerminalPanePolling` and flips to false inside the first successful /current-output fetch handler. `TerminalSplitPaneContent` threads it through `TerminalSplitPane.attaching`, which renders the existing skeleton (`data-testid=terminal-attach-skeleton-${idx}`, `role=status`). On (worktreeId, cliToolId) change the hook resets attaching=true, matching expected re-attach UX.

CLAUDE.md: added 4+ new module rows tagged (Issue #728) for TerminalSplitContainer.tsx, TerminalSplitPane.tsx, TerminalSplitPaneContent.tsx, terminal-split-config.ts, useTerminalSplits.ts, useTerminalPanePolling.ts. Appended Issue #728 notes to WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx, MessageInput.tsx, FilePanelSplit.tsx rows. CHANGELOG.md: added the single-line entry `feat(terminal): add PC terminal 1-3 horizontal split with per-split CLI selector and MessageInput (#728)` under [Unreleased] / ### Added.

quality_gates_after.test_unit: pass (6699/6706, 7 skipped — was 6687/6694 baseline, +12 new tests)
quality_gates_after.build: pass (Next.js compiled successfully; the /api/assistant/current-output dynamic-server log is pre-existing and unrelated)

remaining_followups.title: Remove `state.terminal.*` reducer slice once mobile is also migrated (cross-Issue refactor, out of scope for #728).
Playwright e2e for split add/remove + cross-worktree persistence + 5-instance parallel PaneResizer non-interference (AC-27). Manual smoke OK for this iteration.
Once R3-007 lands, the cli-tab-switching test should be revisited; today it exercises splitIndex=0 through the per-split CLI selector via TerminalSplitPaneContent's polling.
